4: Such a person is gifted with health from birth, yet it is not so robust that prevention could be neglected. They carry a moderate level of aggression and an innate capacity for self-defense. These are positive, good-hearted people. They are pleasant to be around and know how to hold their tongue. They have good taste in clothing, are attractive and patient. They show their angelic patience even with foolish companions. Youthfulness is theirs — such a person looks young for a long time and recovers quickly. A good level of health. Physical endurance, with aggression at a healthy level. Recommendations: good sleep, swimming.
44:
When the matrix holds two or more fours, it means the person has been granted strong health from birth, and along with it a beautiful, powerful body. They may safely take up sports, even at a professional level. 
A gene of youth is theirs — such a person will look young for a very long time and keep a slim body. They may also possess a fine voice. Good physical health and endurance. A beautiful, strong body. They may safely take up sports, even professionally. They love being the center of attention; they are magnetic, charismatic, sensual. Born athletes. They have beautiful eyes and a strong skeletal system (suited to martial arts), and you will never catch these people in a lie. Magnificent liars (fantasizers).
They know how to speak beautifully — these are precisely the people to send into negotiations. They will get whatever they want through words. 
Charisma and an animal magnetism: in men, a virile masculinity; in women, a capacity for many children (that is, they can carry and easily bear several children). Recommendations: sports are essential, along with singing, dancing, and plenty of social interaction.
 However, if this sector is not released, the person becomes aggressive and confrontational and may resort to physical violence. Confidence in their physical strength pushes them into fistfights, especially those who carry three fours (444). Possessing a strong body, they often lose their health by overstraining it, knowing no measure in work or sport.
"111/ 1111 and more"/"1" + "44 and more" — professional sport demanding strength of character, competitive, with a fighting spirit (for example: boxing, hockey). "11"/"111" — as a rule they are drawn to extreme sports. The main problem is aggression. In men, confidence in their physical strength pushes them into such fistfights, especially those with 444. The character of 1111/44/444 — professional athletes.
 444 and more — born thrill-seekers. They love the sensation of walking the knife's edge. The combinations 44/77 or 444/777 — gambling people, players. 444 and more — runners and jumpers. They know how to speak beautifully and to deceive professionally (fantasizers). Swindlers (such people should not be trusted; they deceive to suit themselves). Health-wise, the pancreas suffers.
44 and 333 — a pathological liar, and this cannot be changed. The person invents on the spot. Those around them dislike this, but the person can do nothing about it. How can it be remedied?: they can devise quests and virtual games, become a writer, write screenplays, act, work in fantasy — so as to be an honest person. 
This sector must be released through sport, singing, or socializing, otherwise a field of conflict forms, or there is a risk of various illnesses (since the energy, remaining within, literally poisons the body — risk of cancer, diabetes, stroke, and so on). Such people can be provocateurs and are at times marked by cruelty. 
Recommendations: sports are essential, along with singing, dancing, and plenty of social interaction.

нет:
Such people are not gifted with health from birth and must strengthen it and care for it. A strong body is fairly difficult to cultivate, since it demands a great deal of energy. 
Engaging in accident-prone sports is not recommended, because the wear on the body from training will far exceed the energy the person gains from an active lifestyle; after such loads the person begins to fall ill, and injuries heal poorly. When there is no 4, such a person devours you with words and drains your energy. They do not carry the tasks they begin through to the end. They lack patience and diligence. These people may suffer from biliary dyskinesia (bilious people — a psychosomatic trait).
As a rule, they interrupt others and are very caustic. In childhood they should be sent to sports, and then the program improves. Many draw problems to themselves if there is no 7/8. 
If the matrix has no 2, the person often has a weak immune system from birth. Weak physical health that must be strengthened. The person is energetically lazy. A double idler — a physical idler; any physical labor is torment. They may also treat their health negligently. Impatient people, they often interrupt. Not aggressive. The plus of this sector is the absence of aggression. 
Recommendations: a daily routine, proper nutrition, good sleep. Once a year they should undergo a medical check-up, owing to a predisposition to illness.
